### PhD Scholar in Geography | MPhil, UGC-SRF
--- ## 📬 Contact Information ::: {.cv-contact-row} [pulakesh.mid@gmail.com](mailto:pulakesh.mid@gmail.com) | [+91 8617812861](tel:+918617812861) | Ravenshaw University, Odisha, India ::: ::: {.cv-contact-row} [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pulakeshpradhan/) | [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_DhEQHEAAAAJ) | [GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan) ::: --- ## 🎓 Education **PhD Scholar in Geography** | *Ravenshaw University* *Specialization:* GIS, Remote Sensing, and Google Earth Engine **MPhil in Geography** | *Ravenshaw University* **UGC-SRF (Senior Research Fellow)** ## 🛠️ Technical Skills **Programming Languages:** `Python`, `R`, `JavaScript`, `LaTeX` **GIS & Remote Sensing:** `Google Earth Engine`, `ArcGIS Pro`, `QGIS` **Data Science:** `Machine Learning`, `Phenology Analysis` **Tools & Workflow:** `Git/GitHub`, `Chrome Extension Development` ## 💼 Professional Experience **Resource Person** | Maharaja Sriram Chandra Bhanja Deo University *Sept. 2025* - Conducted workshops on GEE and spatial data science. **Resource Person** | Centurion University *March 2025* - Facilitated training sessions for PG students on geospatial technologies. **YouTube Creator** | [Spatial Geography](https://www.youtube.com/@SpatialGeography) - Developed comprehensive courses on Google Earth Engine, Python, and R for a global audience. ## 📄 Selected Publications **Pradhan, P.** (2025). "Application of analytic hierarchy process for mapping flood vulnerability in Odisha using Google Earth Engine." In *Google Earth Engine and Artificial Intelligence for Earth Observation*. [DOI: 10.1016/j.gee.2025.025](https://doi.org/10.1016/b978-0-443-27372-8.00025-8) **Pradhan, P.** (2024). "Agricultural drought monitoring using Google Earth Engine." In *Modern Cartography Series*. [DOI: 10.1016/b978-0-443-23890-1.00011-6](https://doi.org/10.1016/b978-0-443-23890-1.00011-6) ## 🏆 Honors & Awards - **Senior Research Fellowship (UGC-SRF)** - **Junior Research Fellowship (UGC-JRF)** - **Association of Indian Universities Eastern Zone Runnerup 2023** ## 🤝 Professional Memberships - **Life Member**, National Association of Geographers, India (NAGI) | *Oct. 2025 - Present* ---
[ Download Full CV (PDF)](#){.social-btn}
